Day 1 · 20 May 2026

Base: Scarborough Beach
Route: Perth Airport → Scarborough Beach
Arrival dayBeach sunsetEasy dinner
14:50

🚗 Land at Perth Airport

60–90 min airport process · Immigration, baggage collection, toilet break, and prepare documents for rental car pickup.

15:30

📍 Shuttle bus to Aries kewdale

Paid 56.76 deposit, remaining 591 + 300 deposit ? booking number 36588 Terminal 1 & 2 Follow left exit and wait at Zone L & M contact +61415359777 +61861652422

45 min · Unload luggage, shower, light snack, and reset.

18:30

Day 2 · 21 May 2026

Base: Scarborough Beach
Route: Scarborough → Caversham → Swan Valley → Scarborough
WildlifeSwan ValleyGroceries
08:00

🍽️ Breakfast: Little Sisto

~20 min from Airbnb · Smashed avocado, big breakfast, pancakes, coffee. Good start before wildlife park.

Food typePerth brunch / cafe
Rating4.6★
BackupLittle Bay or any nearby Scarborough cafe
09:00

🚗 Drive to Caversham Wildlife Park

~35–45 min · Bring stroller, jacket, water bottle, and snacks.

10:00

📍 Caversham Wildlife Park

3–4 hours · Kangaroo feeding, koalas, farm show. Adult ~A$37, child ~A$17 according to itinerary.

13:15

🍽️ Lunch: Margaret River Chocolate Company Swan Valley

Casual lunch + dessert · Easy kid-friendly stop. Add ice cream or hot chocolate. Not a fancy lunch but convenient.

Food typeCafe / dessert / chocolate
Rating3.7★
BackupMaison Saint-Honoré Swan Valley — pastries / cafe
14:30

📍 Swan Valley stops: honey/chocolate/fruit picking

1.5–2 hours · Kafarela’s fruit picking if available. Keep flexible based on child energy.

16:30

🚗 Groceries at Karrinyup Coles

45–60 min · Buy water, fruit, bread, milk, child snacks, breakfast items, and road-trip snacks.

18:30

🍽️ Dinner: My Bayon Northbridge

A$20–40 · 4.7★ · Asian comfort food after a long day. Try beef lok lak, fried rice, noodles.

Food typeCambodian / Asian
Rating4.7★
BackupShanghai Street — dumplings / Chinese, 4.6★

Day 3 · 22 May 2026

Base: Scarborough Beach
Route: Scarborough → Lancelin → Pinnacles → Jurien Bay → Scarborough
Long driveSand dunesPinnacles
07:30

🍽️ Simple Airbnb breakfast

30 min · Eat at Airbnb to start early. Prepare snacks and water for the long north drive.

Food typeSelf-prepared
Rating-
BackupDrive-through coffee / bakery stop
08:15

🚗 Drive to Lancelin Sand Dunes

~1.5 hours · Start early to avoid rushing. Bring sunglasses and jacket; dunes can be windy.

09:45

📍 Lancelin Sand Dunes

60–75 min · Short sandboarding/photo stop. With toddler, do not overstay because sand and wind can be tiring.

11:00

🚗 Drive to Pinnacles Desert

~1.5 hours · Use this as child nap time if possible.

12:45

📍 Pinnacles Desert scenic drive

60–90 min · Easy scenic loop. Keep water and sun protection ready.

14:30

🍽️ Late lunch: Jurien Bay fish & chips / cafe

Casual · Choose a simple cafe or fish & chips near Jurien Bay. This is more practical than fine dining.

Food typeSeafood / cafe
RatingCheck on day
BackupPack sandwiches from groceries if child is sleeping
16:00

🚗 Drive back to Perth / Scarborough

~2.5–3 hours · Avoid starting too late because rural roads get darker. Expect tired child.

19:00

🍽️ Dinner: easy takeaway near Airbnb

Flexible · Keep dinner very easy after the long drive.

Food typeTakeaway / Asian / pizza
Rating-
BackupBetty’s Burgers / local pizza / supermarket ready meal

Day 4 · 23 May 2026

Base: Scarborough Beach
Route: Scarborough → Fremantle → Rottnest Island → Fremantle
FerryQuokkaFremantle dinner
07:00

🍽️ Fast breakfast: Airbnb / bakery

30 min · Do not risk slow breakfast before ferry. Pack snacks and water.

Food typeSimple breakfast
Rating-
BackupNot set
07:45

🚗 Drive to Fremantle Ferry Terminal Shed B

~35–45 min + parking · Arrive early for parking, toilet, check-in, and child preparation.

09:00

🚗 Ferry to Rottnest Island

~30 min ferry · Bring jacket; ferry can be windy. Child under 4 may be free based on itinerary notes.

10:00

📍 Rottnest Island bus tour + quokka photos

3–4 hours · Use bus tour instead of cycling. Visit Thomson Bay, The Basin, Pinky Beach if energy allows.

12:30

🍽️ Lunch: Rottnest Bakery

A$1–20 · 4.0★ · Try meat pie, sausage roll, sandwiches. Practical and iconic.

Food typeBakery / Aussie pie / pastries
Rating4.0★
BackupThomsons Rottnest / pack sandwiches
15:30

🚗 Return ferry to Fremantle

~30 min ferry · Earlier return is better with toddler fatigue.

17:30

🍽️ Dinner: Kailis Fish Market Café Fremantle

Seafood dinner · Good match with Fremantle evening. Try fish & chips, grilled fish, calamari.

Food typeSeafood / fish & chips
RatingPopular spot
BackupCicerello’s Fremantle — seafood, family-friendly
19:00

🚗 Drive back to Scarborough

~35–45 min · Return, bath, and early rest.

Route: Scarborough → Bunbury → Canal Rocks → Yallingup
Road trip southWineryCanal Rocks

~1.5–2 hours to first stop · Pack luggage neatly. Prepare snacks because this is a moving day.

Roadside cafe stop · Good road-trip breakfast. Easy parking and child-friendly.

Food typeCafe / breakfast / playground vibe
RatingPopular family stop

12:30

🚗 Drive to Canal Rocks

14:00

📍 Canal Rocks photo stop

45–60 min · Very scenic, but watch wind and child safety near rocks.

15:15

RatingPopular

30–45 min · Optional. Skip if child is tired or weather is cold.

Food typeIce cream / dessert
Rating-
BackupMargaret River Chocolate Company
17:30

Rest evening · Keep dinner light if late lunch was heavy.

19:00

Food typeSimple / groceries / takeaway
Rating-

18:30

Day 8 · 27 May 2026

Base: Willetton → Perth Airport
Route: Willetton → Airport → KUL
Departure dayNo rushingFlight 3:50 PM
08:30

🍽️ Breakfast / brunch near Airbnb

45–60 min · Keep luggage and child routine simple. Do not go far from airport direction.

Food typeCafe / simple breakfast
Rating-
BackupAirbnb breakfast from groceries
10:00

🏡 Pack and final check-out

60–90 min · Check all child items, passports, chargers, medicine, milk powder, stroller, and car seat.

11:30

🍽️ Early lunch before airport

45 min · Eat before airport because airport food is more expensive and less flexible.

Food typeSimple / nearby / takeaway
Rating-
BackupPack takeaway sandwiches/snacks
12:30

🚗 Drive to Perth Airport + return rental car

~25–35 min drive + return buffer · Aim to reach airport area around 12:45–13:00 for 3:50 PM international flight.

15:50

🚗 Flight Perth → Kuala Lumpur

Departure · End of trip.
